name: journeyos_context
description: Odyssey supplies the active booking page, trip details, selected flight, selected hotel, total, and safety boundaries. Treat it as authoritative.

name: select_bundle
description: Select a curated package only after explicit traveler choice. Payload field id must be exactly value, overall, or neighborhood.

name: confirm_booking
description: Open the admin payment review only after the traveler explicitly confirms the selected package. This does not submit a Sabre booking.

name: collect_payment
description: Prepare an Odyssey PayPal Sandbox admin-advance order only after the traveler explicitly asks to pay. It does not book a supplier or collect card details by voice.
